metadata.title: Build an SRX agent for visual generation using memory_lens, processing memory_write_risk inputs from a chaotic_power_user in a global_cross_border context.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX agent for visual generation using memory_lens, processing memory_write_risk inputs from a chaotic_power_user in a global_cross_border context.
mission.success_definition: Agent compiles without errors. Inputs with memory_write_risk are blocked or sanitized before processing. Visual generation outputs are safe, compliant, and auditable.

in_scope.item: Agent must accept memory_write_risk inputs, apply memory_lens transformations, and produce visual generation outputs. All operations must be logged and auditable.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent compiles without errors. Inputs with memory_write_risk are blocked or sanitized before processing. Visual generation outputs are safe, compliant, and auditable.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.mission_contract: Build an SRX agent for visual generation using memory_lens, processing memory_write_risk inputs from a chaotic_power_user in a global_cross_border context.

operating_rules.item: No memory write operations permitted without explicit user consent and compliance validation. Cross-border data flows must adhere to GDPR, CCPA, and applicable local regulations. All outputs must be non-reversible and free of PII or sensitive content.

tool_policy.item: Use only declared tools and record tool limitations.

output_artifact_contract.item: Returns a JSON object with fields: status (blocked|completed), receipt (repair receipt if blocked), artifact (compiled agent if completed), and compliance_evidence (list of checks performed).

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains memory_write_risk as chaos input type with no sanitization or access control constraints. Missing context for cross-border data flow, no legal or compliance guardrails, and ambiguous acceptance criteria prevent safe compilation. Blocking to avoid unauthorized memory mutation or data leakage.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
